entry.title: Weather Forecast: Delhi-UP समेत इन राज्यों में भारी बारिश की आशंका, Alert हुआ जारी वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Weather Forecast: Delhi-UP समेत इन राज्यों में भारी बारिश की आशंका, Alert हुआ जारी वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Weather Forecas: The India Meterological Department (IMD) Monday predicted widespread rain over northeast India, West Bengal and Sikkim, Bihar and adjoining east Uttar Pradesh over the next four days. Isolated extremely heavy falls are very likely over Himalayan West Bengal and Sikkim today.
भारतीय मौसम विभाग ने अपने ताजा अपडेट में कहा है कि अगले कुछ घंटों के दौरान पश्चिम बंगाल, सिक्किम, असम, मेघालय, हिमाचल प्रदेश तथा उत्तर प्रदेश और बिहार के तराई क्षेत्रों में मूसलाधार बारिश हो सकती है तो वहीं मायानगरी मुंबई में भी भारी बारिश ने उत्पात मचाया हुआ है, कल मुंबई में जमकर बारिश हुई है तो वहीं आज भी मुंबई, गोवा-कोंकण में भारी बारिश का अलर्ट जारी हुआ है।
#WeatherForecast #RainfallAlert #Delhi-UP
entry.summary: Weather Forecas: The India Meterological Department (IMD) Monday predicted widespread rain over northeast India, West Bengal and Sikkim, Bihar and adjoining east Uttar Pradesh over the next four days. Isolated extremely heavy falls are very likely over Himalayan West Bengal and Sikkim today. भारतीय मौसम विभाग ने अपने ताजा अपडेट में कहा है कि अगले कुछ घंटों के दौरान पश्चिम बंगाल, सिक्किम, असम, मेघालय, हिमाचल प्रदेश तथा उत्तर प्रदेश और बिहार के तराई क्षेत्रों में मूसलाधार बारिश हो सकती है तो वहीं मायानगरी मुंबई में भी भारी बारिश ने उत्पात मचाया हुआ है, कल मुंबई में जमकर बारिश हुई है तो वहीं आज भी मुंबई, गोवा-कोंकण में भारी बारिश का अलर्ट जारी हुआ है। #WeatherForecast #RainfallAlert #Delhi-UP

entry.title: Radioactive Trailer 07 24 2020

link.title: Radioactive Trailer 07 24 2020

entry.content:
Radioactive (Amazon Studios) Stars: Rosamund Pike, Yvette Feuer, Mirjam Novak
From the 1870s through to modern day, RADIOACTIVE is a journey through Marie Curie’s (Rosamund Pike) enduring legacies – her passionate partnerships, scientific breakthroughs, and the consequences that follow.
In late 19th century Paris, Marie met fellow scientist Pierre Curie (Sam Riley). The pair went on to marry, raised two daughters and changed the face of science forever by their discovery of radioactivity. In 1903, the pair jointly won the Nobel Prize in physics for their discovery, making Marie the first woman to win the esteemed prize.
After the death of her beloved Pierre, Marie’s commitment to science remained unwavering and her work went on to win her second Nobel Prize, taking with it the responsibility for discoveries which changed the world. This is a bold, visionary depiction of legacy of an extraordinary life, the transformative effects and ensuing fallout of the Curie’s work and an exploration of how this impacted the defining moments of the 20th Century.
entry.summary: Radioactive (Amazon Studios) Stars: Rosamund Pike, Yvette Feuer, Mirjam Novak From the 1870s through to modern day, RADIOACTIVE is a journey through Marie Curie’s (Rosamund Pike) enduring legacies – her passionate partnerships, scientific breakthroughs, and the consequences that follow. In late 19th century Paris, Marie met fellow scientist Pierre Curie (Sam Riley). The pair went on to marry, raised two daughters and changed the face of science forever by their discovery of radioactivity. In 1903, the pair jointly won the Nobel Prize in physics for their discovery, making Marie the first woman to win the esteemed prize. After the death of her beloved Pierre, Marie’s commitment to science remained unwavering and her work went on to win her second Nobel Prize, taking with it the responsibility for discoveries which changed the world. This is a bold, visionary depiction of legacy of an extraordinary life, the transformative effects and ensuing fallout of the Curie’s work and an exploration of how this impacted the defining moments of the 20th Century.

entry.title: Amazon Tells Workers To Uninstall TikTok App, Pronto

link.title: Amazon Tells Workers To Uninstall TikTok App, Pronto

entry.content:
Amazon employees have been told to remove the short-video app TikTok from their devices immediately.
According to CNN, TikTok is owned by the world’s most valuable startup, a Chinese company named ByteDance.
But TikTok does not operate in China and functions as an independent subsidiary. Its servers are based in the US and not subject to Chinese laws.
However, other organizations have moved to ban TikTok. For instance, the US military has prevented soldiers from installing the app
On Friday, the DNC warned Democratic campaigns, committees and state parties to take additional security precautions when using TikTok.
We continue to advise campaign staff to refrain from using TikTok on personal devices. If you are using TikTok for campaign work, we recommend using a separate phone and account. Security Team Democratic National Committee
entry.summary: Amazon employees have been told to remove the short-video app TikTok from their devices immediately. According to CNN, TikTok is owned by the world’s most valuable startup, a Chinese company named ByteDance. But TikTok does not operate in China and functions as an independent subsidiary. Its servers are based in the US and not subject to Chinese laws. However, other organizations have moved to ban TikTok. For instance, the US military has prevented soldiers from installing the app On Friday, the DNC warned Democratic campaigns, committees and state parties to take additional security precautions when using TikTok. We continue to advise campaign staff to refrain from using TikTok on personal devices. If you are using TikTok for campaign work, we recommend using a separate phone and account. Security Team Democratic National Committee

entry.title: Lunar Eclipse July 2020:चंद्र ग्रहण से ठीक पहले ISRO को मिली कामयाबी वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Lunar Eclipse July 2020:चंद्र ग्रहण से ठीक पहले ISRO को मिली कामयाबी वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Under ISRO’s Mars Orbiter Mission, Mars Color Camera has taken photos of Phobos, the closest and largest moon to Mars. This photo was taken on July 1 … Let me tell you, this picture was taken when the Mars Orbiter Mission is 7200 km from Mars and 4200 km from Phobos
इसरो के मार्स ऑर्बिटर मिशन के तहत मार्स कलर कैमरा ने मंगल के सबसे करीबी और सबसे बड़े चंद्रमा फोबोस की तस्वीरें ली गई हैं. ये तस्वीर 1 जुलाई को ली गई…आपको बता दे ये तस्वीर तब ली गई जब मार्स ऑर्बिटर मिशन मंगल ग्रह से 7200 किमी और फोबोस से 4200 किमी दूर
#LunarEclipse2020 #LunarEclipse5July #ISRO #Phobos
entry.summary: Under ISRO’s Mars Orbiter Mission, Mars Color Camera has taken photos of Phobos, the closest and largest moon to Mars. This photo was taken on July 1 … Let me tell you, this picture was taken when the Mars Orbiter Mission is 7200 km from Mars and 4200 km from Phobos इसरो के मार्स ऑर्बिटर मिशन के तहत मार्स कलर कैमरा ने मंगल के सबसे करीबी और सबसे बड़े चंद्रमा फोबोस की तस्वीरें ली गई हैं. ये तस्वीर 1 जुलाई को ली गई…आपको बता दे ये तस्वीर तब ली गई जब मार्स ऑर्बिटर मिशन मंगल ग्रह से 7200 किमी और फोबोस से 4200 किमी दूर #LunarEclipse2020 #LunarEclipse5July #ISRO #Phobos

entry.title: Are sanctions an effective punishment for human rights abuses? Inside Story

link.title: Are sanctions an effective punishment for human rights abuses? Inside Story

entry.content:
UK government targets suspects linked to the killing of Saudi journalist Jamal Khashoggi.
Are sanctions an effective punishment for human rights abuses? Inside Story
Are sanctions an effective punishment for human rights abuses? Inside Story
Are sanctions an effective punishment for human rights abuses? Inside Story
entry.summary: UK government targets suspects linked to the killing of Saudi journalist Jamal Khashoggi.Are sanctions an effective punishment for human rights abuses? entry.title: Coronavirus India : Health Minister Harsh Vardhan बोले,अभी कम्युनिटी स्प्रेड नहीं वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus India : Health Minister Harsh Vardhan बोले,अभी कम्युनिटी स्प्रेड नहीं वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Corona virus cases in India are creating new records every day, due to which people are in awe. Meanwhile, Union Health Minister Dr. Harsh Vardhan has given relief to the people with one of his statements. Dr. Harsh Vardhan has advised people not to be afraid. He once again reiterated his point that there has not been a community spread of Corona in the country. The Union Health Minister said that India has come third in the list of most affected countries in the case of corona cases. But there is nothing to be worried about it… He said that in terms of population, India Corona is not spread that much
भारत में कोरोना वायरस के केस रोजाना नया रिकॉर्ड बना रहे हैं, जिससे लोगों में खौफ है। इस बीच केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्री डॉ़ हर्षवर्धन ने अपने एक बयान से लोगों को राहत दी है।डॉ हर्षवर्धन ने लोगों को भयभीत ना होने की सलाह दी है। उन्होंने एक बार फिर अपनी बात दोहराते हुए कहा कि देश में कोरोना का कम्यूनिटी स्प्रेड नहीं हुआ है। केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्री ने कहा कि कोरोना केसों के मामले में भारत सबसे ज्यादा प्रभावित देशों की लिस्ट में तीसरे नंबर पर आ गया है।लेकिन इस पर चिंतित होने वाली कोई बात नहीं …उन्होंने कहा कि जनसंख्या के लिहाज से देखा जाए तो भारत में कोरोना उतना नहीं फैला है
#Coronavirus #HarshVardhan
entry.summary: Corona virus cases in India are creating new records every day, due to which people are in awe. Meanwhile, Union Health Minister Dr. Harsh Vardhan has given relief to the people with one of his statements. Dr. Harsh Vardhan has advised people not to be afraid. He once again reiterated his point that there has not been a community spread of Corona in the country. The Union Health Minister said that India has come third in the list of most affected countries in the case of corona cases. But there is nothing to be worried about it… He said that in terms of population, India Corona is not spread that much भारत में कोरोना वायरस के केस रोजाना नया रिकॉर्ड बना रहे हैं, जिससे लोगों में खौफ है। इस बीच केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्री डॉ़ हर्षवर्धन ने अपने एक बयान से लोगों को राहत दी है।डॉ हर्षवर्धन ने लोगों को भयभीत ना होने की सलाह दी है। उन्होंने एक बार फिर अपनी बात दोहराते हुए कहा कि देश में कोरोना का कम्यूनिटी स्प्रेड नहीं हुआ है। केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्री ने कहा कि कोरोना केसों के मामले में भारत सबसे ज्यादा प्रभावित देशों की लिस्ट में तीसरे नंबर पर आ गया है।लेकिन इस पर चिंतित होने वाली कोई बात नहीं …उन्होंने कहा कि जनसंख्या के लिहाज से देखा जाए तो भारत में कोरोना उतना नहीं फैला है #Coronavirus #HarshVardhan

entry.title: MS Dhoni-Sakshi Wedding Anniversary: 10th years of Love, Simplicity & Togetherness वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: MS Dhoni-Sakshi Wedding Anniversary: 10th years of Love, Simplicity & Togetherness वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
MS Dhoni-Sakshi Wedding Anniversary: 10th years of Love, Simplicity & Togetherness. Mahendra Singh Dhoni is easily one of the most loved Indian cricketers in history. When he tied the knot with Sakshi Singh Rawat on 4 July 2010 India extended big love to her as well. Soon they became a power duo setting couple goals for many and people enjoyed seeing glimpses of Captain Cool’s romantic side every once in a while.
धोनी भले ही टीम इंडिया में कैप्टेंसी न निभा रहे हों लेकिन उन्हें फैंस अभ भी कैप्टन कूल के नाम से ही पुकारते हैं। धोनी को ये नाम उनकी कूल कैप्टेंसी की वजह से ही मिला है। धोनी जितने कूल मैदान पर रहते हैं उतने ही वो अपनी निजी जिंदगी में भी। बता दे 2 साल तक एक दूसरे को डेट करने के बाद धोनी ने वेलेनटाइन के दिन साक्षी को अचानक से शादी के लिए प्रपोज किया था और कुछ ही दिनों बाद उनके साथ शादी की थी।
#MSDhoni #SakshiDhoni #MSDhoniWeddingAnniversary
entry.summary: MS Dhoni-Sakshi Wedding Anniversary: 10th years of Love, Simplicity & Togetherness. Mahendra Singh Dhoni is easily one of the most loved Indian cricketers in history. When he tied the knot with Sakshi Singh Rawat on 4 July 2010 India extended big love to her as well. Soon they became a power duo setting couple goals for many and people enjoyed seeing glimpses of Captain Cool’s romantic side every once in a while. धोनी भले ही टीम इंडिया में कैप्टेंसी न निभा रहे हों लेकिन उन्हें फैंस अभ भी कैप्टन कूल के नाम से ही पुकारते हैं। धोनी को ये नाम उनकी कूल कैप्टेंसी की वजह से ही मिला है। धोनी जितने कूल मैदान पर रहते हैं उतने ही वो अपनी निजी जिंदगी में भी। बता दे 2 साल तक एक दूसरे को डेट करने के बाद धोनी ने वेलेनटाइन के दिन साक्षी को अचानक से शादी के लिए प्रपोज किया था और कुछ ही दिनों बाद उनके साथ शादी की थी। #MSDhoni #SakshiDhoni #MSDhoniWeddingAnniversary

entry.title: லடாக்கில் இந்தியா புதிய நடவடிக்கை.. சீனா அதிர்ச்சி!

link.title: லடாக்கில் இந்தியா புதிய நடவடிக்கை.. சீனா அதிர்ச்சி!

entry.content:
லடாக்கில் இந்தியா புதிய நடவடிக்கை.. சீனா அதிர்ச்சி!
India sends Apache helicopters and sukoi planes to border

entry.title: Nehru’s Five Year Plans- a vision that inspired Growth with Equality

link.title: Nehru’s Five Year Plans- a vision that inspired Growth with Equality

entry.content:
This was the day when Jawahar Lal Nehru initiated the first Five Year Plan for the integrated economic development of the country, the vision that focussed on growth with equality worked wonders with an outperforming GDP for the initial years after independence, the Modi government replaced the concept of FYPs with Niti Aayog which is just an advisory body with no power to allocate funds, in the tough times of Covid-19, Nehruvian vision of inclusive growth is being missed.
#JawaharLalNehru #NitiAayog #Covid19 #Modigovernment #GDP
entry.summary: This was the day when Jawahar Lal Nehru initiated the first Five Year Plan for the integrated economic development of the country, the vision that focussed on growth with equality worked wonders with an outperforming GDP for the initial years after independence, the Modi government replaced the concept of FYPs with Niti Aayog which is just an advisory body with no power to allocate funds, in the tough times of Covid-19, Nehruvian vision of inclusive growth is being missed. #JawaharLalNehru #NitiAayog #Covid19 #Modigovernment #GDP

entry.title: Surat gold jewellery industry incurring losses due shortage of artisans

link.title: Surat gold jewellery industry incurring losses due shortage of artisans

entry.content: Jewellery shop owners in Surat are incurring losses as gold artisans have returned to their native places due to COVID-19. Vijay Mangukiya, Secretary, Surat Jewellery Association said, “Around 70% of artisans have left in COVID fear.”“Most of these artisans are from West Bengal. Our expenses are fixed but income has reduced as there is shortage of labour as well as less demand for gold. The condition has become so worst that we are unable to survive,” Vijay Mangukiya added. In the times of pandemic the demand of gold has also gone down.
entry.summary: Jewellery shop owners in Surat are incurring losses as gold artisans have returned to their native places due to COVID-19. Vijay Mangukiya, Secretary, Surat Jewellery Association said, “Around 70% of artisans have left in COVID fear.”“Most of these artisans are from West Bengal. Our expenses are fixed but income has reduced as there is shortage of labour as well as less demand for gold. The condition has become so worst that we are unable to survive,” Vijay Mangukiya added. In the times of pandemic the demand of gold has also gone down.

entry.title: 2-Delhi’s Decline In Covid Cases, A ‘Data Gimmick’

link.title: 2-Delhi’s Decline In Covid Cases, A ‘Data Gimmick’

entry.content:
An analysis of the data suggests that the decline in active Covid-19 cases is likely due to a new test, Antigen, that the Delhi Govt introduced on June 18. But have the Coronavirus cases actually decreased in the national capital?
#DataGimmick #Coronavirus #Covid19 #ICMR #PCRtest
entry.summary: An analysis of the data suggests that the decline in active Covid-19 cases is likely due to a new test, Antigen, that the Delhi Govt introduced on June 18. But have the Coronavirus cases actually decreased in the national capital? #DataGimmick #Coronavirus #Covid19 #ICMR #PCRtest

entry.title: How Telling People To Cheer Up Can Be A Form Of ‘Toxic Positivity’

link.title: How Telling People To Cheer Up Can Be A Form Of ‘Toxic Positivity’

entry.content:
Some people are committed to looking on the bright side of every situation, no matter how grim.
But according to HuffPost, that same healthy mindset can sometimes go too far, devolving into something called ‘toxic positivity.’
It’s the belief that if we ignore difficult emotions and the parts of our life that aren’t working as well, we’ll be much happier.” Heather Monroe, LCSW Director of Program Development, Newport Institute.
Unblinking optimism and shutting the door on negative feelings doesn’t make them go away; if anything, it exacerbates them.
Toxic positivity can encourage a person to remain silent about their struggles. However, isolation actually fuels these emotional issues.
What’s the solution? Accept that it’s okay to recognize that multiple complex emotions can exist in you all at once.
You can be devastated at the loss of life from COVID-19, or the brutal reality of systemic racism, and still enjoy spending more time at home.
Once you’ve identified your feelings, take action to take care of yourself in a healthy, loving way.
entry.summary: Some people are committed to looking on the bright side of every situation, no matter how grim. But according to HuffPost, that same healthy mindset can sometimes go too far, devolving into something called ‘toxic positivity.’ It’s the belief that if we ignore difficult emotions and the parts of our life that aren’t working as well, we’ll be much happier.” Heather Monroe, LCSW Director of Program Development, Newport Institute. Unblinking optimism and shutting the door on negative feelings doesn’t make them go away; if anything, it exacerbates them. Toxic positivity can encourage a person to remain silent about their struggles. However, isolation actually fuels these emotional issues. What’s the solution? Accept that it’s okay to recognize that multiple complex emotions can exist in you all at once. You can be devastated at the loss of life from COVID-19, or the brutal reality of systemic racism, and still enjoy spending more time at home. Once you’ve identified your feelings, take action to take care of yourself in a healthy, loving way.

entry.title: Rescued lion illustrates plight of thousands of other cubs

link.title: Rescued lion illustrates plight of thousands of other cubs

entry.content: Simba the lion was rescued and taken to an animal shelter in Chelyabinsk, southern Russia, but many other cubs have not been as fortunate.View on euronews
entry.summary: Simba the lion was rescued and taken to an animal shelter in Chelyabinsk, southern Russia, but many other cubs have not been as fortunate.View on euronews

entry.title: Bhopal: Covid-19 patient’s body dumped outside hospital, shocking video emerges Oneindia

link.title: Bhopal: Covid-19 patient’s body dumped outside hospital, shocking video emerges Oneindia

entry.content: A coronavirus patient’s body was left on the pavement outside a hospital in Bhopal on Monday night after a tragic to-and-fro between hospitals. Security footage shows two ambulance workers in PPE suits taking the body out in a stretcher, leaving the patient on the pavement and driving off with the stretcher. The patient, a power distribution company employee, was admitted to hospital two weeks ago with a kidney condition. In the last few days, he had developed breathing trouble and was suspected to have pneumonia. He tested positive for COVID-19 on Monday evening. IT giant Infosys flew back some of its employees and their families who were stranded in the United States due to the coronavirus crisis and visa issues. The Uttar Pradesh police are investigating a letter reportedly written by the officer who led a failed raid on gangster Vikas Dubey on Friday and was killed along with seven other cops. The Shiv Sena on Tuesday said Prime Minister Narendra Modi had expressed confidence that the battle against Covid-19 would be won in 21 days, but it has been over 100 days and the crisis still persists.
entry.summary: A coronavirus patient’s body was left on the pavement outside a hospital in Bhopal on Monday night after a tragic to-and-fro between hospitals. Security footage shows two ambulance workers in PPE suits taking the body out in a stretcher, leaving the patient on the pavement and driving off with the stretcher. The patient, a power distribution company employee, was admitted to hospital two weeks ago with a kidney condition. In the last few days, he had developed breathing trouble and was suspected to have pneumonia. He tested positive for COVID-19 on Monday evening. IT giant Infosys flew back some of its employees and their families who were stranded in the United States due to the coronavirus crisis and visa issues. The Uttar Pradesh police are investigating a letter reportedly written by the officer who led a failed raid on gangster Vikas Dubey on Friday and was killed along with seven other cops. The Shiv Sena on Tuesday said Prime Minister Narendra Modi had expressed confidence that the battle against Covid-19 would be won in 21 days, but it has been over 100 days and the crisis still persists.

entry.title: Protesters burn American flag in New York on Fourth of July

link.title: Protesters burn American flag in New York on Fourth of July

entry.content:
A group calling themselves the Revolution Club set alight the American flag at Columbus Circle in New York, then marched to Trump Tower and repeated the stunt on Fourth of July.
The small crowd threw the stars and stripes into the center of a circle and ignited the pile in a protest against US President Donald Trump and reject America First policy.
When the group was done with the flag burning in Columbus Circle, an NYPD truck outside Trump Hotel played the national anthem through loud speakers.
On their Twitter profile, NYC Revolution Club describes themselves as, "Fighting the Power & Transforming the People, for Revolution. Based on the New Communism, developed by Bob Avakian."
entry.summary: A group calling themselves the Revolution Club set alight the American flag at Columbus Circle in New York, then marched to Trump Tower and repeated the stunt on Fourth of July. The small crowd threw the stars and stripes into the center of a circle and ignited the pile in a protest against US President Donald Trump and reject America First policy. When the group was done with the flag burning in Columbus Circle, an NYPD truck outside Trump Hotel played the national anthem through loud speakers. On their Twitter profile, NYC Revolution Club describes themselves as, "Fighting the Power & Transforming the People, for Revolution. Based on the New Communism, developed by Bob Avakian."

entry.title: Video of Kerala woman ensuring blind man boards bus is winning hearts on social media Oneindia News

link.title: Video of Kerala woman ensuring blind man boards bus is winning hearts on social media Oneindia News

entry.content: In a video that’s being widely shared across social media, a woman in Kerala is seen running behind a bus to stop it so that she could help an elderly, visually challenged man board the vehicle. The gesture has been praised widely on social media and the woman has received a lot of praise. The clip showed the woman chasing after a public bus, and urging the conductor to wait a little longer as the man is seen walking up to it slowly, while using a cane. She is then seen running back to the man, walking with him to the bus and helping him board it.
entry.summary: In a video that’s being widely shared across social media, a woman in Kerala is seen running behind a bus to stop it so that she could help an elderly, visually challenged man board the vehicle. The gesture has been praised widely on social media and the woman has received a lot of praise. The clip showed the woman chasing after a public bus, and urging the conductor to wait a little longer as the man is seen walking up to it slowly, while using a cane. She is then seen running back to the man, walking with him to the bus and helping him board it.

entry.title: Football : les supporters de retour en tribunes

link.title: Football : les supporters de retour en tribunes

entry.content:
Ce dimanche 12 juillet au Havre (Seine-Maritime), les passionnés de football ont, pour la première fois depuis le confinement, pu assister à un match de haut niveau. Ils étaient près de 5000 à garnir les tribunes du stade Océane, à l’occasion de la rencontre Le Havre-PSG.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Ce dimanche 12 juillet au Havre (Seine-Maritime), les passionnés de football ont, pour la première fois depuis le confinement, pu assister à un match de haut niveau. Ils étaient près de 5000 à garnir les tribunes du stade Océane, à l’occasion de la rencontre Le Havre-PSG. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Nepal-ளை கைக்குள் போட்டுக்கொள்ள துடிக்கும் China China Power Play

link.title: Nepal-ளை கைக்குள் போட்டுக்கொள்ள துடிக்கும் China China Power Play

entry.content:
#Nepal
#ChinaNepal
chinese interference Nepal NPC standing committee meeting has been postponed
நேபாளத்தில் நடக்கவிருந்த ஆளும் நேபாளம் கம்யூனிஸ்ட் கட்சியின் நிலைக்குழு கமிட்டிக் கூட்டம் மேலும் ஒரு வாரத்திற்கு ஒத்தி வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. சீனாவில் இருந்து பிரதமர் கேபி சர்மா ஒலிக்கு ஆதரவாக அழுத்தம் இருப்பதால் இந்த நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது என்று கூறப்படுகிறது. ஆனால், மழை பெய்து நிலச்சரிவு காரணமாகவும் ஒத்தி வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது என்ற தகவலும் வெளியாகியுள்ளது.
entry.summary: #Nepal #ChinaNepal chinese interference Nepal NPC standing committee meeting has been postponed நேபாளத்தில் நடக்கவிருந்த ஆளும் நேபாளம் கம்யூனிஸ்ட் கட்சியின் நிலைக்குழு கமிட்டிக் கூட்டம் மேலும் ஒரு வாரத்திற்கு ஒத்தி வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. சீனாவில் இருந்து பிரதமர் கேபி சர்மா ஒலிக்கு ஆதரவாக அழுத்தம் இருப்பதால் இந்த நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது என்று கூறப்படுகிறது. ஆனால், மழை பெய்து நிலச்சரிவு காரணமாகவும் ஒத்தி வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது என்ற தகவலும் வெளியாகியுள்ளது.

entry.title: Groups file Supreme Court petitions vs anti-terror law Evening wRap

link.title: Groups file Supreme Court petitions vs anti-terror law Evening wRap

entry.content:
Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world:
- Supreme Court battle vs anti-terror law starts, cops arrest 11 at anti-terrorism law rally in Laguna
- Philippine coronavirus cases surpass 46,000, as infections continue to increase
- 2 cops tagged in murder of 15-year-old girl in Ilocos Sur
- Kanye West says he’s running for U.S. president
- FALSE: Trillanes says Duterte created COVID-19 with China
entry.summary: Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world: - Supreme Court battle vs anti-terror law starts, cops arrest 11 at anti-terrorism law rally in Laguna - Philippine coronavirus cases surpass 46,000, as infections continue to increase - 2 cops tagged in murder of 15-year-old girl in Ilocos Sur - Kanye West says he’s running for U.S. president - FALSE: Trillanes says Duterte created COVID-19 with China

entry.title: Video of The Week: Vicky Prasetyo Dipenjara, Papa T Bob Meninggal Dunia

link.title: Video of The Week: Vicky Prasetyo Dipenjara, Papa T Bob Meninggal Dunia

entry.content:
Vicky Prasetyo dijebloskan ke penjara atas kasus Angel Lelga, kabar duka pencipta lagu anak-anak Papa T Bob meninggal dunia.
Berikut ini rangkuman video artis paling hot selama sepekan ini, di antaranya: Vicky Prasetyo dijebloskan ke penjara atas kasus Angel Lelga, dan kabar duka pencipta lagu anak-anak Papa T Bob meninggal dunia.
Cekidot!
6. Gara-gara di Rumah Aja, Nina Zatulini Positif Hamil Anak Ketiga
Kabar bahagia datang dari artis cantik Nina Zatulini. Ia mengumukan hamil anak ketiga pada Senin (6/7/2020).
Baca Selengkapnya
5. Dinda Hauw Resmi Menikah dengan Rey Mbayang
Isu Dinda Hauw dan Rey Mbayang akan menikah ternyata bukan hanya gosip belaka.
Baca selengkapnya
4. Buka-bukaan Ivan Gunawan Jadi Saksi Kasus Klinik Kecantikan Ilegal
Pada hari ini, Kamis (9/7/2020), presenter dan desainer Ivan Gunawan mendatangi Pengadilan Negeri Jakarta Utara untuk diperiksa sebagai saksi dalam sidang kasus klinik kecantikan ilegal.
Baca Selengkapnya
entry.summary: Vicky Prasetyo dijebloskan ke penjara atas kasus Angel Lelga, kabar duka pencipta lagu anak-anak Papa T Bob meninggal dunia. Berikut ini rangkuman video artis paling hot selama sepekan ini, di antaranya: Vicky Prasetyo dijebloskan ke penjara atas kasus Angel Lelga, dan kabar duka pencipta lagu anak-anak Papa T Bob meninggal dunia. Cekidot! 6. Gara-gara di Rumah Aja, Nina Zatulini Positif Hamil Anak Ketiga Kabar bahagia datang dari artis cantik Nina Zatulini. Ia mengumukan hamil anak ketiga pada Senin (6/7/2020). Baca Selengkapnya 5. Dinda Hauw Resmi Menikah dengan Rey Mbayang Isu Dinda Hauw dan Rey Mbayang akan menikah ternyata bukan hanya gosip belaka. Baca selengkapnya 4. Buka-bukaan Ivan Gunawan Jadi Saksi Kasus Klinik Kecantikan Ilegal Pada hari ini, Kamis (9/7/2020), presenter dan desainer Ivan Gunawan mendatangi Pengadilan Negeri Jakarta Utara untuk diperiksa sebagai saksi dalam sidang kasus klinik kecantikan ilegal. Baca Selengkapnya

entry.title: கணவர் எப்போதும் போனில் பிசி.. கடுப்பில் அந்த மொழியை கற்றுக்கொண்ட நடிகை - வீடியோ

link.title: கணவர் எப்போதும் போனில் பிசி.. கடுப்பில் அந்த மொழியை கற்றுக்கொண்ட நடிகை - வீடியோ

entry.content:
மும்பை: கணவர் எப்போதும் போனில் இருப்பதால், தான் சைகை மொழியை கற்றுக் கொண்டதாக பிரபல நடிகை தெரிவித்துள்ளார்.
Actress Neena gupta says,’I Have Learned Sign Language During This Lockdown Due To My Husband’s Phone Addiction’
Read more at:
entry.summary: மும்பை: கணவர் எப்போதும் போனில் இருப்பதால், தான் சைகை மொழியை கற்றுக் கொண்டதாக பிரபல நடிகை தெரிவித்துள்ளார். Actress Neena gupta says,’I Have Learned Sign Language During This Lockdown Due To My Husband’s Phone Addiction’ Read more at:
